title: lonicera tenuipes var. glandulosa
intro: Lonicera tenuipes var. glandulosa, also known as the Himalayan honeysuckle or glandular Lonicera, is a type of flowering plant in the honeysuckle family native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Lonicera tenuipes var. glandulosa include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever and inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, and is also used in combination with other herbs to create tonics and remedies for various health conditions.
